mapper.select: /* adm-address-sql-oracle.xml - selectAddrInfoDetail */ SELECT A.ADDRID , A.SHPGLOCID , A.SHPGLOCNM , A.SHPGLOCTYPCD , A.INSERTDATE , A.UPDATEDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TT_SHPG_LOC_T A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T B ON A.ADDRID = B.ADDRID WHERE A.ADDRID = #{addrid} ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC

/* adm-address-sql-oracle.xml - selectAddr */
SELECT ADDRID, ADDNT, UNIT, STNM, CTYNM, ZIPCD, CNTRYCD, STACD, SHPGLOCNM ,'STACD' || ';' || STACD AS STA ,'CNTRYCD' || ';' || CNTRYCD AS CTRY , LAT, LON, ADDRSTTCD, DELYN , INSERTDATE , UPDATEDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T T0 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ADDRID = #{addrid}
